mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.EVA_YEAR DESC,A.POOL_CD DESC) R_NUM, A.PERIOD_DIV_CD, A.EVA_YEAR, A.POOL_CD, (SELECT CODE_NM FROM EVA_CODE WHERE GROUP_CD = 'POOL_CD' AND CODE = A.POOL_CD) AS POOL_CODE_NM, A.POOL_CD_NM, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.ST_DT, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY"년" MM"월" DD"일"') AS ST_YMD, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.ED_DT, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY"년" MM"월" DD"일"') AS ED_YMD, A.STATUS_CD FROM EVA_POOL_SCHE A WHERE A.STATUS_CD = 'N' ) WHERE R_NUM BETWEEN #{start_no} AND #{last_no}

SELECT DI, ROLE, USR_ID, PRIV_YN, PRIV_DTTM, QUAN_YN, QUAL_YN, DISQ_YN_1, DISQ_UNIV_CD_1, DISQ_YN_2, DISQ_UNIV_CD_2, NAME, GENDER, TEL_HP, TEL_HOME, BIRTHDAY, ADDR_HOME_ZIPCODE, ADDR_HOME, ADDR_HOME_DETAIL, UNIV_CD, JOB_NM, POSITION, DEPT, EMAIL, ADDR_JOB_ZIPCODE, ADDR_JOB, ADDR_JOB_DETAIL, TEL_JOB, RESUME_1, RESUME_2, EDU_DIV, JOB_CD, UNIV_DIV, CTPV_CD, DEL_YN, INPT_ID, INPT_DT, LAST_CHNRG_ID, LAST_CHG_DT FROM EVA_POOL_M WHERE TEL_HP = #{telHp} AND NAME = #{name}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EVA_POOL_M WHERE NAME = #{name} AND TEL_HP = #{telHp}
